name: MASCO CORP /DE/
business: Masco Corporation designs, manufactures, and distributes branded home improvement and building products including paint, faucets, bath fixtures, hardware, and spas. Its products are sold primarily for repair and remodeling activity and, to a lesser extent, new home construction.

exposures.sentence: Our portfolio of industry-leading brands includes BEHR paint; DELTA and HANSGROHE faucets, bath and shower fixtures; LIBERTY branded decorative and functional hardware; and HOT SPRING spas.
Within our Plumbing Products segment we develop connected water products that enhance the experience with water in homes and businesses.
We are subject to cybersecurity attacks, which could adversely impact our results of operations and financial position.
Consumer preferences have also changed, including a shift in consumer purchasing practices toward e-commerce...

catalysts.sentence: As part of our capital allocation strategy, the Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.32 per share in the first quarter of 2026 with the intention to increase the annual dividend three percent to $1.28 per share.

Effective February 10, 2026, our Board of Directors authorized the repurchase, for retirement, of up to $2.0 billion of shares of our common stock, exclusive of excise tax, in open-market transactions or otherwise, replacing the previous Board of Directors authorization established in 2022.
In connection with these actions, we incurred charges of approximately $18 million in the fourth quarter of 2025, and we expect to incur approximately $50 million in additional charges in 2026.
